description: private, day, college-prep school in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, USA

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description_wiki: The London School of Economics and Political Science, commonly known as the London School of Economics or LSE, is a public research university in London, England, and a member institution of the University of London.

description_wiki: London is the capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom, with a population of 9.1 million people in 2024.

description_wiki: The United States House of Representatives is a chamber of the bicameral United States Congress; it is the lower house, with the U.S. Senate being the upper house.

description: 1973 petroleum shortage
description_wiki: In October 1973, the Organization of Arab Petroleum Exporting Countries (OAPEC) announced that it was implementing a total oil embargo against countries that had supported Israel at any point during the 1973 Yom Kippur War, which began after Egypt and Syria launched a large-scale surprise attack in an ultimately unsuccessful attempt to recover the territories that they had lost to Israel during the 1967 Six-Day War.

description: unorganized territory of the United States
